hooks.command: STDIN_DATA=$(cat); FILE=$(printf '%s' "$STDIN_DATA" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); case "$FILE" in *.py) CONTENT=$(printf '%s' "$STDIN_DATA" | jq -r '.tool_input.content // ""'); printf '%s' "$CONTENT" | grep -q 'print(' && echo 'Warning: print() statements should be replaced with logging' >&2 && exit 2;; esac

STDIN_DATA=$(cat); FILE=$(printf '%s' "$STDIN_DATA" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); case "$FILE" in pyproject.toml) echo 'Checking for vulnerable dependencies...'; if command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1; then uvx pip-audit; elif command -v safety >/dev/null 2>&1; then safety check; elif command -v pip-audit >/dev/null 2>&1; then pip-audit; else echo 'No security audit tool found. Install uv or safety'; fi;; esac

STDIN_DATA=$(cat); FILE=$(printf '%s' "$STDIN_DATA" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); case "$FILE" in *.py) uv run ruff check --fix --quiet "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; uv run ruff format --quiet "$FILE" 2>/dev/null;; esac

STDIN_DATA=$(cat); FILE=$(printf '%s' "$STDIN_DATA" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); case "$FILE" in *.py) RESULT=$(uv run mypy "$FILE" 2>&1); STATUS=$?; if [ $STATUS -ne 0 ] && uv run mypy --version >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "MyPy type checking issues found: $RESULT" >&2; exit 2; fi;; esac

STDIN_DATA=$(cat); FILE=$(printf '%s' "$STDIN_DATA" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); case "$FILE" in *test_*.py|*_test.py) ;; *.py) DIR=$(dirname "$FILE"); BASENAME=$(basename "$FILE" .py); for TEST_FILE in "$DIR/test_$BASENAME.py" "$DIR/${BASENAME}_test.py" "tests/test_$BASENAME.py"; do if [ -f "$TEST_FILE" ]; then echo "Running tests for $TEST_FILE..."; uv run pytest "$TEST_FILE" -v 2>/dev/null || echo 'No uv-compatible test runner found'; break; fi; done;; esac

if [ -f pyproject.toml ]; then CHANGED=$(git diff --name-only --diff-filter=ACMR 2>/dev/null | grep '\.py$'); if [ -n "$CHANGED" ]; then echo 'Running ruff on changed Python files...'; uv run ruff check --fix --quiet $CHANGED 2>/dev/null; uv run ruff format --quiet $CHANGED 2>/dev/null; fi; fi

if [ -f pyproject.toml ]; then CHANGED=$(git diff --name-only --diff-filter=ACMR 2>/dev/null | grep '\.py$'); if [ -n "$CHANGED" ]; then echo 'Running type checking on changed files...'; if uv run mypy --version >/dev/null 2>&1; then uv run mypy $CHANGED || echo 'Type checking completed with issues'; else echo 'MyPy not found in uv environment for type checking'; fi; fi; fi
